<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="인프라/참조 정리 에이전트">
너는 noisetest1-convert 팀의 인프라 에이전트야. Task #1을 수행해.

프로젝트 경로: C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\리크 검사기 신진&엔케이\신진\

## 작업 내용:

### 1. LeakTestMachine_신진1.vbproj 수정
- FlexCell Reference 삭제 (67~71번줄)
- NI UI Reference 삭제: NationalInstruments.Common (72~75), NationalInstruments.DAQmx.ComponentModel (80~83), NationalInstruments.UI (84~86), NationalInstruments.UI.WindowsForms (87~89)
- **NationalInstruments.DAQmx는 유지** (76~79)
- COMReference 삭제: AxCWUIControlsLib (268~275), CWUIControlsLib (276~284)
- Import 삭제: NationalInstruments (103), NationalInstruments.UI (104)
- ZedGraph Reference 추가:
```xml
<Reference Include="ZedGraph, Version=5.2.0.439, Culture=neutral, PublicKeyToken=02a83cbd123fcd60, processorArchitecture=MSIL">
  <HintPath>..\packages\ZedGraph.5.2.0\lib\net35-Client\ZedGraph.dll</HintPath>
</Reference>
```
- ClassZedGraph.vb Compile 항목 추가 (Module1.vb 근처):
```xml
<Compile Include="ClassZedGraph.vb" />
```

### 2. packages.config 생성 (프로젝트 폴더에)
```xml
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<packages>
  <package id="ZedGraph" version="5.2.0" targetFramework="net48" />
</packages>
```

### 3. ClassZedGraph.vb 복사
C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\converttp\ClassZedGraph.vb → C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\리크 검사기 신진&엔케이\신진\ClassZedGraph.vb

### 4. My Project\licenses.licx 비우기 (빈 파일)

### 5. 모든 .resx 파일에서 NI OcxState/FlexCell 리소스 항목 제거
대상 resx: FrmMain.resx, FrmPart.resx, FrmSearch.resx, FrmSearch2.resx, FrmPassWord.resx, FrmTest.resx, FrmSet.resx, FrmSIgnal.resx, FrmSeq.resx
- `AxCWUIControlsLib`, `CWUIControlsLib`, `NationalInstruments`, `FlexCell` 관련 data 항목(name에 OcxState 포함) 삭제
- NI ScatterGraph 관련 data 항목도 삭제
- 나머지 리소스(이미지 등)는 유지

각 resx 파일을 읽고, NI/FlexCell 관련 리소스 항목만 제거해라. resx는 XML 형식이다.

작업 완료 후 TaskUpdate로 Task #1을 completed로 마크해라.
</teammate-message>

Imports System.Drawing
Imports System.Drawing.Drawing2D
Imports ZedGraph

''' <summary>
''' ZedGraph 헬퍼 클래스 - NI ScatterGraph 스타일 호환
''' 배경: RGB(0, 0, 54) 진한 남색 / 선: Lime 형광 녹색 1.7두께 / 그리드 없음
'''
''' 사용법:
'''   1. ZedGraph NuGet 설치 (packages.config: ZedGraph 5.2.0)
'''   2. Form에 ZedGraphControl 배치
'''   3. Form_Load에서 ClassZedGraph.InitGraph() 호출
'''   4. 데이터 추가: ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph() / ClearGraph()
'''
''' 참조 프로젝트: MYUNG_BO_NOISETEST / LsuptNoiseTestmx5 (2025-12-19)
''' </summary>
Public Class ClassZedGraph
    Private Sub New()
    End Sub

    ''' <summary>
    ''' 그래프 초기화 - NI ScatterGraph 스타일 재현
    ''' </summary>
    ''' <param name="zg">대상 ZedGraphControl</param>
    ''' <param name="title">그래프 제목 (상단 표시)</param>
    ''' <param name="yTitle">Y축 단위 레이블 (예: "dB", "mm", "A")</param>
    ''' <param name="yMin">Y축 고정 최소값</param>
    ''' <param name="yMax">Y축 고정 최대값</param>
    ''' <param name="xMax">X축 초기 범위 (자동 스케일 적용되므로 참고값)</param>
    ''' <param name="pointsCapacity">RollingPointPairList 버퍼 크기</param>
    ''' <param name="clearAll">기존 곡선 초기화 여부</param>
    ''' <param name="curveColor">선 색상 (Nothing이면 Lime)</param>
    ''' <param name="lineWidth">선 두께 (기본 1.7)</param>
    Public Shared Sub InitGraph(
        zg As ZedGraphControl,
        title As String,
        yTitle As String,
        yMin As Double,
        yMax As Double,
        Optional xMax As Double = 25,
        Optional pointsCapacity As Integer = 10000000,
        Optional clearAll As Boolean = True,
        Optional curveColor As Nullable(Of Color) = Nothing,
        Optional lineWidth As Single = 1.7F
    )
        ' NI ScatterGraph 스타일 색상
        Dim bgColor As Color = Color.FromArgb(0, 0, 54)       ' 진한 남색 배경
        Dim labelColor As Color = Color.White                  ' 흰색 레이블
        Dim lineColor As Color = If(curveColor.HasValue, curveColor.Value, Color.Lime)  ' 형광 녹색

        Dim pane As GraphPane = zg.GraphPane
        zg.IsAntiAlias = True

        If clearAll Then
            pane.CurveList.Clear()
            pane.GraphObjList.Clear()
            zg.ZoomOutAll(pane)
        End If

        ' 타이틀
        pane.Title.Text = title
        pane.Title.IsVisible = Not String.IsNullOrEmpty(title)
        pane.Title.FontSpec.Size = 48.0F
        pane.Title.FontSpec.FontColor = labelColor
        pane.Title.FontSpec.IsBold = True
        pane.Title.FontSpec.Family = "굴림"

        ' 축 타이틀
        pane.XAxis.Title.Text = ""
        pane.YAxis.Title.Text = yTitle
        pane.XAxis.Title.IsVisible = False
        pane.YAxis.Title.IsVisible = Not String.IsNullOrEmpty(yTitle)

        ' X축 - 자동 스케일
        pane.XAxis.Type = AxisType.Linear
        pane.XAxis.Scale.Min = 0
        pane.XAxis.Scale.Max = xMax
        pane.XAxis.Scale.MinAuto = True
        pane.XAxis.Scale.MaxAuto = True
        pane.XAxis.Scale.MajorStepAuto = True
        pane.XAxis.Scale.MinorStepAuto = True
        pane.XAxis.Scale.FontSpec.FontColor = labelColor
        pane.XAxis.Scale.FontSpec.Size = 36.0F
        pane.XAxis.Color = labelColor
        pane.XAxis.MajorGrid.IsVisible = False
        pane.XAxis.MinorGrid.IsVisible = False
        pane.XAxis.MajorTic.Color = labelColor
        pane.XAxis.MinorTic.Color = labelColor

        ' Y축 - 고정 범위
        pane.YAxis.Scale.Min = yMin
        pane.YAxis.Scale.Max = yMax
        pane.YAxis.Scale.MinAuto = False
        pane.YAxis.Scale.MaxAuto = False
        pane.YAxis.Scale.MajorStepAuto = True
        pane.YAxis.Scale.FontSpec.FontColor = labelColor
        pane.YAxis.Scale.FontSpec.Size = 36.0F
        pane.YAxis.Title.FontSpec.FontColor = labelColor
        pane.YAxis.Color = labelColor
        pane.YAxis.MajorGrid.IsVisible = False
        pane.YAxis.MinorGrid.IsVisible = False
        pane.YAxis.MajorTic.Color = labelColor
        pane.YAxis.MinorTic.Color = labelColor

        ' 배경
        pane.Fill = New Fill(bgColor)
        pane.Chart.Fill = New Fill(bgColor)
        pane.Chart.Border.IsVisible = False
        pane.Border.IsVisible = False

        ' 범례 숨김
        pane.Legend.IsVisible = False

        ' 마진 최소화
        pane.Margin.All = 0
        pane.Margin.Left = 5
        pane.Margin.Bottom = 5

        ' 곡선 추가
        Dim rolling As New RollingPointPairList(pointsCapacity)
        Dim curve = pane.AddCurve(If(String.IsNullOrEmpty(title), "Series", title), rolling, lineColor, SymbolType.None)
        curve.Line.Width = lineWidth
        curve.Line.IsSmooth = False
        curve.Line.IsAntiAlias = True

        zg.AxisChange()
        zg.Invalidate()
    End Sub

    ''' <summary>
    ''' 데이터 포인트 1개 추가 (NI PlotXYAppend 대체)
    ''' 실시간 스트리밍 데이터에 사용
    ''' </summary>
    ''' <param name="zg">대상 ZedGraphControl</param>
    ''' <param name="series">곡선 인덱스 (보통 0)</param>
    ''' <param name="yValue">Y 값</param>
    ''' <param name="xValue">X 값 (시간 등)</param>
    Public Shared Sub DrawGraph(zg As ZedGraphControl, series As Integer, yValue As Double, xValue As Double)
        If zg Is Nothing Then Return

        Dim pane = zg.GraphPane
        If pane.CurveList.Count = 0 Then Return
        If series < 0 OrElse series >= pane.CurveList.Count Then Return

        Dim curve = TryCast(pane.CurveList(series), LineItem)
        If curve Is Nothing Then Return

        Dim pts = TryCast(curve.Points, IPointListEdit)
        If pts Is Nothing Then Return

        pts.Add(xValue, yValue)

        zg.AxisChange()
        zg.Invalidate()
    End Sub

    ''' <summary>
    ''' 배열 데이터 한번에 플롯 (NI PlotXY 대체)
    ''' </summary>
    Public Shared Sub PlotXY(zg As ZedGraphControl, xArray() As Double, yArray() As Double, Optional series As Integer = 0)
        If zg Is Nothing Then Return
        If xArray Is Nothing OrElse yArray Is Nothing Then Return
        If xArray.Length <> yArray.Length Then Return

        Dim pane = zg.GraphPane
        If pane.CurveList.Count = 0 Then Return
        If series < 0 OrElse series >= pane.CurveList.Count Then Return

        Dim curve = TryCast(pane.CurveList(series), LineItem)
        If curve Is Nothing Then Return

        Dim pts = TryCast(curve.Points, IPointListEdit)
        If pts Is Nothing Then Return

        pts.Clear()
        For i As Integer = 0 To xArray.Length - 1
            pts.Add(xArray(i), yArray(i))
        Next

        zg.AxisChange()
        zg.Invalidate()
    End Sub

    ''' <summary>
    ''' 그래프 데이터 클리어 (NI ClearData 대체)
    ''' </summary>
    Public Shared Sub ClearGraph(zg As ZedGraphControl, Optional series As Integer = 0)
        If zg Is Nothing Then Return

        Dim pane = zg.GraphPane
        If pane.CurveList.Count = 0 Then Return
        If series < 0 OrElse series >= pane.CurveList.Count Then Return

        Dim curve = TryCast(pane.CurveList(series), LineItem)
        If curve Is Nothing Then Return

        Dim pts = TryCast(curve.Points, IPointListEdit)
        If pts IsNot Nothing Then pts.Clear()

        zg.AxisChange()
        zg.Invalidate()
    End Sub

    ''' <summary>
    ''' X축 범위 수동 설정
    ''' </summary>
    Public Shared Sub SetXAxisRange(zg As ZedGraphControl, minVal As Double, maxVal As Double)
        If zg Is Nothing Then Return
        Dim pane = zg.GraphPane
        pane.XAxis.Scale.MinAuto = False
        pane.XAxis.Scale.MaxAuto = False
        pane.XAxis.Scale.Min = minVal
        pane.XAxis.Scale.Max = maxVal
        zg.AxisChange()
        zg.Invalidate()
    End Sub

    ''' <summary>
    ''' Y축 범위 수동 설정
    ''' </summary>
    Public Shared Sub SetYAxisRange(zg As ZedGraphControl, minVal As Double, maxVal As Double)
        If zg Is Nothing Then Return
        Dim pane = zg.GraphPane
        pane.YAxis.Scale.Min = minVal
        pane.YAxis.Scale.Max = maxVal
        zg.AxisChange()
        zg.Invalidate()
    End Sub

End Class
